title: aristida ternipes var. divergens
intro: Aristida ternipes var. divergens, also known as silver beard grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aristida ternipes var. divergens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
